Trip.title: Trip Catalog Item
Trip.description: Details of a specific travel package with itinerary and pricing overview

title.description: Human readable name of the package

duration.description: A descriptive duration string like 3 Days 2 Nights

coverImage.description: Image URL of the trip banner

itinerary.description: Chronological list of itinerary day activities

Batch.title: Departure Batch Calendar
Batch.description: A scheduled departure date linked to a trip with associated seat quotas, seat availability, and specific batch pricing

tripId.description: Target reference ID for the trip entity

availableSeats.description: Remaining seat spaces left for reservation

price.description: Rupiah price per customer for this schedule

status.description: Status indicating if sales are open or closed

Booking.title: Traveler Registration Booking
Booking.description: Customer reservation files, transaction receipt references, audit states, and contact coordinates

bookingCode.description: High visibility verification serial number like SJ-XXXXX

tripTitle.description: Snapshot of trip title at the moment of booking

email.description: Traveler transaction and updates email address

phone.description: Main traveler active mobile phone digits

proofOfPayment.description: Base64 string or CDN URL of payment transfer slip

status.description: Internal status of receipt audit verification

rejectReason.description: Failure audit notes published to the traveler on status checks

totalPrice.description: Calculation of total price billed to the developer

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp for database sort order
